title: gouldia degeneri
intro: Gouldia degeneri, a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae, is native to the island of New Caledonia. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Gouldia degeneri include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In traditional medicine, the leaves of the plant are often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used in herbal preparations such as teas and tinctures.
